_meta.description: Manually maintained metadata for tracked Pokémon TCG sets
_meta.notes: Pull rates are community estimates, not official. Prices for unreleased sets are pre-market projections.

sets.name: Evolving Skies
sets.in_print_note: Out of print. Most valuable SWSH set.

pull_rates.notes: Alt arts are very rare. Umbreon VMAX alt ~1 in 700. Best SWSH set for value.

pricing.price_note: OOP. Most valuable modern set. Eeveelution alt arts drive prices.
pricing.sources: Estimated from market trends

pull_rates.notes: Trainer Gallery adds hits. Charizard VSTAR rainbow ~1 in 400.

pricing.price_note: OOP. Charizard VSTAR and Trainer Gallery drive demand.
pricing.sources: Estimated from market trends

pull_rates.notes: Small set (88 cards), decent pull rates.

pricing.price_note: OOP. No booster box. Special set.
pricing.sources: Estimated

pull_rates.notes: Giratina V alt art is the chase. Trainer Gallery adds value.

pricing.price_note: OOP. Giratina V alt art (00) carries the set.
pricing.sources: Estimated from market trends

sets.name: Crown Zenith
sets.in_print_note: Out of print, secondary market only

pull_rates.notes: Galarian Gallery card ~1 in 3 packs. Gold/Secret ~1 in 125.

pricing.price_note: OOP, secondary market. Box is assembled, not retail.
pricing.sources: TCGPlayer market data via PittPokeResearch, Dawnglare, retailer checks

sets.name: Scarlet & Violet
sets.in_print_note: Out of print (Regulation G rotated Spring 2026)

pull_rates.notes: Any SIR ~1 in 32. Any IR ~1 in 13. Specific SIR ~1 in 318.

pricing.price_note: OOP. Regulation G rotated. Moderate premium.
pricing.sources: PittPokeResearch TCGPlayer data

sets.name: Paldea Evolved
sets.in_print_note: Out of print (Regulation G rotated Spring 2026)

pull_rates.notes: 26 SIRs in set. Any SIR ~1 in 32. Specific SIR ~1 in 832.

pricing.price_note: OOP. Most expensive SV box. Magikarp IR ($316) drives demand.
pricing.sources: PittPokeResearch TCGPlayer data

sets.name: Obsidian Flames
sets.in_print_note: Out of print (Regulation G rotated Spring 2026)

pull_rates.notes: 6 SIRs. Charizard ex SIR ~1 in 450. Charizard carries the set.

pricing.price_note: OOP. Second most expensive SV box. Charizard ex SIR ($114, up 19% in 30 days).
pricing.sources: PittPokeResearch TCGPlayer data

sets.name: Pokémon 151
sets.in_print_note: Out of print, elevated secondary market prices

pull_rates.notes: Any IR ~1 in 13 packs. Any SIR ~1 in 65. Specific Charizard ex 199 ~1 in 450 (7 SIRs in set).

pricing.price_note: OOP, highest premium modern set. No retail box.
pricing.sources: TCGPlayer market data via PittPokeResearch, Dawnglare, retailer checks

sets.name: Paradox Rift
sets.in_print_note: Out of print (Regulation G rotated Spring 2026)

pull_rates.notes: Standard SV rates. Decent diversity, moderate chase values.

pricing.price_note: OOP. Moderate premium, no standout chase.
pricing.sources: PittPokeResearch TCGPlayer data

pull_rates.notes: Any SIR ~1 in 58 packs. Specific Mew ex 232 ~1 in 375 (multiple SIRs).

pull_rate_sources.notes: Community data, confirmed SIR rate of ~1 in 58

pricing.price_note: Limited reprint. No booster box product. Bundle (6pk) ~$149.
pricing.sources: TCGPlayer market data via PittPokeResearch, Dawnglare, retailer checks

pull_rates.notes: HARDEST SIR pull rates in SV era. Any SIR ~1 in 86 (vs 1 in 32 for earlier sets).

pricing.price_note: In print. Hardest SIR pull rates in SV era (1 in 86).
pricing.sources: PittPokeResearch TCGPlayer data

pull_rates.notes: Any SIR ~1 in 86 packs. Specific Greninja ex ~1 in 600 (6-8 SIRs in set).

pricing.price_note: OOP/low supply, significant MSRP premium.
pricing.sources: TCGPlayer market data via PittPokeResearch, Dawnglare, retailer checks

sets.name: Shrouded Fable
sets.in_print_note: Still in print (Regulation H). Mini set.

pull_rates.notes: Mini set (99 cards). 21% hit rate per pack. Any SIR ~1 in 67.

pricing.price_note: Mini set, no booster box. Bundle (6pk) ~$49.44 ($8.24/pk) is best value.
pricing.sources: PittPokeResearch TCGPlayer data

sets.name: Stellar Crown
sets.in_print_note: Still available at or near MSRP

pull_rates.notes: Any IR/SIR ~1 in 50 packs. Any SIR ~1 in 70. Specific Terapagos ~1 in 420 (6 SIRs).

pull_rate_sources.notes: Community data from pack opening aggregation

pricing.price_note: OOP/low supply, ~2x MSRP.
pricing.sources: TCGPlayer market data via PittPokeResearch, Dawnglare, retailer checks

pull_rates.notes: Any SIR ~1 in 60. Specific Pikachu ex 238 ~1 in 660 (11 SIRs in set).

pricing.price_note: Limited availability, ~1.6x MSRP.
pricing.sources: TCGPlayer market data via PittPokeResearch, Dawnglare, retailer checks

sets.name: Prismatic Evolutions
sets.in_print_note: Actively in print, extremely high demand

pull_rates.notes: Any SIR ~1 in 45 (notably easier than standard SV sets). Specific Umbreon ~1 in 380 (8 SIRs).

pull_rate_sources.notes: Community data confirms ~2x easier SIR rate vs 2024 main sets

pricing.price_note: Special set, no retail box. Bundle (6pk) ~$93.
pricing.sources: TCGPlayer market data via PittPokeResearch, Dawnglare, retailer checks

pull_rates.notes: Any SIR ~1 in 75 packs. Specific Lillie's Clefairy ~1 in 500.

pull_rate_sources.notes: Early community data, SV-era pull rate norms

pricing.price_note: Recently released, ~1.8x MSRP.
pricing.sources: TCGPlayer market data via PittPokeResearch, Dawnglare, retailer checks

pull_rates.notes: Reported as lowest pull rates in years. Any SIR ~1 in 95. Hyper Rare ~1 in 149.

pull_rate_sources.notes: Japanese set data extrapolated; early English community reports

pricing.price_note: Extremely high demand (Giovanni Mewtwo). ~3.7x MSRP.
pricing.sources: TCGPlayer market data via PittPokeResearch, Dawnglare, retailer checks

pull_rates.notes: MHR (any) ~1 in 1260 — lowest in TCG history. Any SIR ~1 in 101. Any IR ~1 in 9.

pull_rate_sources.notes: Japanese set data; TCGPlayer 5,000-pack study from JP release

pricing.price_note: First ME-era set, ~1.8x MSRP.
pricing.sources: TCGPlayer market data via PittPokeResearch, Dawnglare, retailer checks

pull_rates.notes: MHR (any) ~1 in 530 (2x better than ME base). Any SIR ~1 in 80. Largest English set ever (295 cards).

pull_rate_sources.notes: Japanese release data; ~2,000 pack community study

pricing.price_note: Special set, no booster box. Bundle (6pk) ~$86.
pricing.sources: TCGPlayer market data via PittPokeResearch, Dawnglare, retailer checks

pull_rates.notes: MHR ~1 in 1,786 (only 1 MHR in set — even rarer than ME base). Any SIR ~1 in 90.

pull_rate_sources.notes: Japanese release data, ME-era pull rate trends

pricing.price_note: Best value current set, ~$5.64/pk in box.
pricing.sources: TCGPlayer market data via PittPokeResearch, Dawnglare, retailer checks

pull_rates.notes: ESTIMATED — no English data yet. Based on ME-era trends (1 MHR per set, ~1 in 1,260-1,786 range).

pull_rate_sources.notes: Pre-release estimates from Japanese Ninja Spinner set data

pricing.price_note: Not yet released. Preorder prices, Walmart ~$239.
pricing.sources: TCGPlayer market data via PittPokeResearch, Dawnglare, retailer checks
